statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1158 — Brocard's problem n ∈ [251, 300] Lean 4 extension
  ==============================================================

  Follow-up to STEP 1157 (n ∈ [211, 250]). Same Nat.sqrt-based O(log) approach.

  Target: n ∈ [251, 300] non-square verification (50 new theorems).
  Combined with prior STEPs: Rei-AIOS Brocard coverage n ∈ [1, 300] (~317 theorems total).

  Honest positioning:
    - Berndt-Galway 2000: N ≤ 10⁹ (Brocard's problem search limit).
    - Rei contribution: Lean 4 mechanical verification first record continues.
    - Brocard conjecture itself remains OPEN since 1876.

  Sc

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
